title: AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer
summary: Matthew Raynor is an AI Engineer & Full-Stack Developer who builds production-grade software from the ground up. His work spans computer vision, LLM integration, agentic AI systems, and full-stack web development using React, TypeScript, Django, and modern cloud tooling.

agentic_ai_shopping_assistant.description: Production agentic AI assistant using LangChain and Claude that manages carts, searches photos semantically, and helps visualize art on walls

enterprise_computer_vision.description: Photo capture and validation system using TensorFlow.js and MediaPipe for real-time image quality detection

wall_visualization.description: ML-powered feature that lets customers visualize prints on their walls using depth estimation

totetaxi.description: Full-stack logistics platform with multi-step booking, dynamic pricing, and real-time delivery tracking

historyface_ai.description: AI SaaS app using facial recognition and HuggingFace models for face transformation

approach: Methodical engineering - plans deeply, breaks down problems clearly, and designs systems that scale. Specializes in taking complex real-world processes and transforming them into clean, reliable, user-friendly software.
background: Self-taught using adaptive technology after a spinal cord injury. Former commercial fisherman who rebuilt his life through code and creativity.
